title: Neomammillaria bella

The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the prevention and treatment of various diseases. The bioactive constituents of Neomammillaria bella include flavonoids, saponins, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. taxonomy: Neomammillaria bella is classified as a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Cactoideae. The genus Neomammillaria is now considered a synonym of Mammillaria and is no longer recognized as a separate genus. Neomammillaria bella is therefore reclassified as Mammillaria bella. It is native to Mexico.
